english: oar / rudder / helm (figuratively: the reins of power)
notes: Can mean an oar (for rowing) or a rudder/helm (for steering a ship). The phrase 'am Ruder sein' means to be in charge/at the helm.

sentences.german: Der Matrose hielt das Ruder fest, damit das Schiff auf Kurs blieb.
sentences.english: The sailor held the rudder firmly so that the ship stayed on course.

sentences.german: Die Ruderer zogen die Ruder gleichzeitig durchs Wasser.
sentences.english: The rowers pulled the oars through the water at the same time.

sentences.german: Nach den Wahlen übernahm die neue Partei das Ruder.
sentences.english: After the elections, the new party took the helm.
